headline: Textron (TXT) Wins Mario Gabelli’s Support on Growth in Business Jets and V-280 Defense Program
summary: Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT) is one of the best stocks to buy according to billionaire Mario Gabelli. Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT) is one of the companies in GAMCO Investors’ portfolio where the hedge fund has actually increased its stake from its position from more than a decade ago. headline: Clear the Strait of Hormuz? Watch These Defense Stocks.
summary: Iran’s mining threat in the Strait of Hormuz is pushing the U.S. military to deploy advanced detection, drones, and missile systems—technology produced by companies including Lockheed Martin, RTX, Huntington Ingalls, and Textron.
